result:
All fixes are implemented and verified working end-to-end (`next build` + `next start`, all routes checked). Summary of what was wrong and what I fixed:

**Root cause:** the site mid-pivoted from "InboxZap" (email cleanup tool) to "Lumina" (AI meeting assistant), and the rebrand never finished technically — meanwhile 12 real blog posts existed but were unreachable from the source.

1. **Title/meta mismatch** — `layout.tsx` emitted "InboxZap — Clean Your Inbox in Minutes" sitewide (no per-page overrides), contradicting all actual page content. Added a title template + per-page `metadata` exports on every route (home, features, pricing, blog, blog posts) with correct Lumina titles/descriptions/canonicals/OG tags.
2. **Orphaned blog** — `/blog` was 100% client-rendered (`useEffect` + `fetch`), so crawlers saw only a loading spinner, and even the rendered list had no links to posts. The 12 posts themselves had **no source route at all** (`app/blog/[slug]` didn't exist) and were excluded from the sitemap — this is exactly why GSC shows them getting 13,000+ impressions but near-zero clicks at position 40–60: real content, zero internal links, zero sitemap signal. Rebuilt the blog index as a server component with real `<a href>` links, added `app/blog/[slug]/page.tsx` with the actual post content/metadata, and added all 12 posts to `sitemap.ts`.
3. **Missing pages** — nav linked to `/features` and `/pricing`, neither existed in source. Added both with proper metadata (also fixed a duplicate-`<h1>` issue on Features along the way).
4. **Dead redirect** — `/faq` permanently redirected to `/#faq`, but no FAQ section existed. Added a real FAQ section (with `FAQPage` JSON-LD) to the homepage.
5. Added `Organization` and `SoftwareApplication` JSON-LD structured data.
6. Added a contextual CTA on each legacy blog post bridging "inbox overload" → "meeting overload" → Lumina, so the 12 posts (which still represent real demand per GSC) drive product traffic once they're actually indexable, instead of being thrown away.

Two things outside code scope worth flagging: `next@14.2.5` has a known security advisory (worth a dependency bump), and `/img/og-lumina.png` referenced by OG tags doesn't exist as an asset yet — needs a real image from design.
